# Inspect SWE

> Software engineering agents for Inspect AI.

## Home

- [Home](https://meridianlabs-ai.github.io/inspect_swe/index.html.md)

## Agents

- [Claude Code](https://meridianlabs-ai.github.io/inspect_swe/claude_code.html.md)
- [Codex CLI](https://meridianlabs-ai.github.io/inspect_swe/codex_cli.html.md)
- [Gemini CLI](https://meridianlabs-ai.github.io/inspect_swe/gemini_cli.html.md)
- [OpenCode](https://meridianlabs-ai.github.io/inspect_swe/opencode.html.md)
- [Mini SWE Agent](https://meridianlabs-ai.github.io/inspect_swe/mini_swe_agent.html.md)
